title: Lead Software Engineer,Data Science & AI
company_focus: Marketing technology and customer experience solutions
description:
A Lead Data Scientist will define the technical direction
for advanced analytics, Generative AI, and ML projects,
while also building and nurturing a talented team to deliver
impactful, production-grade solutions. You will work closely
with senior stakeholders, cross-functional teams, and
business leaders to drive the organization’s data science
vision.

ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves defining technical direction for
Generative AI and ML projects, directly working with LLMs
and models. Building production-grade AI solutions indicates
hands-on model work rather than just infrastructure support.
